problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Combining Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
